Calculation.Text: // Returns a boolean = true if biggerVersionString ≥ smallerOrEqualVersionString // Versionstring defined by "Majorversion.Minorversion.Patchversion" // Equal if True - test conditions includes ≥, if False - test condition includes > Let ( [ biggerVersionString = Substitute ( biggerVersionString ; "." ; " " ); biggerVersionMajor = GetAsNumber ( LeftWords( biggerVersionString ;1 )) * 1000000; biggerVersionMinor = GetAsNumber ( MiddleWords (biggerVersionString ; 2; 1)) * 1000; biggerVersionPatch = GetAsNumber ( RightWords (biggerVersionString ; 1)); biggerVersion = biggerVersionMajor + biggerVersionMinor + biggerVersionPatch; smallerVersionString = Substitute ( smallerVersionString ; "." ; " " ); smallerVersionMajor = GetAsNumber ( LeftWords( smallerVersionString ;1 )) * 1000000; smallerVersionMinor = GetAsNumber ( MiddleWords (smallerVersionString ; 2;1)) * 1000; smallerVersionPatch = GetAsNumber ( RightWords (smallerVersionString; 1)); smallerVersion = smallerVersionMajor + smallerVersionMinor + smallerVersionPatch ]; Case (equals ; Case ( biggerVersion ≥ smallerVersion; True; False); Case ( biggerVersion > smallerVersion; True; False) ) )
